title: aira calycina
intro: Aira calycina, also known as Wood Meadow-grass, is a species of perennial grass native to Europe and western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Aira calycina include its potential to aid in the healing of cuts and abrasions, reduce inflammation, and promote wound closure. Aira calycina can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, although its use and preparation may require further research and validation.
